deleteAccount.title: Delete account permanently
deleteAccount.step1: This will mark <0>your entire account</0> for deletion: your profile, all your data (clients, projects, leads, transactions, goals, sessions, reminders, etc.)<1> and your login itself</1>.
deleteAccount.step1b: You have <0>{{days}} days</0> to change your mind: on every sign-in during this period you can cancel and go back to normal use. After that, everything is permanently deleted and <1>can't be recovered</1> — and you won't be able to sign in again with the same account.
deleteAccount.step2: To confirm, {{type}} <0>{{phrase}}</0> in the box. The {{days}}-day countdown begins right after.

resetAccount.title: Reset account — delete all data
resetAccount.step1: This will delete <0>all the data in your account</0>: clients, projects, groups, leads, transactions and recurring expenses, categories, tasks, goals and goal entries, daily questions and their answers, recorded sessions, notes, reminders, statuses and sources.
resetAccount.step1b: <0>This action can't be undone.</0> Onboarding will start over so you can begin from scratch.
resetAccount.step2: To confirm for good, {{type}} <0>{{word}}</0> in the box. This is the final confirmation — everything is deleted right after.

export.title: Export data
export.intro: All your data downloads together as a single Excel file with one sheet per type; the individual exports are separate CSV files.
export.exportAllHint: One file with a sheet per type: transactions, clients, projects, leads, tasks, categories.
export.sensitiveSub: Not included by default. Sensitive data is exported as plain text — keep the file somewhere safe.
export.reimportHint: The client and project files are saved in a re-importable format (the same headers the system recognizes).

feedback.title: Talk to us
feedback.lead: We'd love to hear from you — every note helps us improve.
feedback.placeholder: {{write}} us anything that's on your mind…
feedback.privacyHint: To protect your clients' privacy — please don't include details that identify them (full name, phone).
feedback.sendFailed: Something went wrong while sending. You can try again.

profileHealth.title: Profile health
profileHealth.noGaps: No open gaps — everything's in use.

lead.full: Everything's in use — you're getting the most out of the system.
lead.high: Almost everything's in place. One more small touch and you're there.
lead.mid: You're on the right track — a few steps and your profile is complete.
lead.low: There's a real opportunity here to get more out of the system.

issueGuard.finalMsg: This will issue a real tax document that can't be canceled. Issue for {{amount}}?

quoteSource.title: Quotes
quoteSource.pickLabel: Where should the daily quote come from?
quoteSource.emptyPersonal: No personal quotes yet — until you add some, a quote from the library will show.
quoteSource.addPlaceholder: Write a line that speaks to you…
